resposta:
solution: ```python
class Solution:
    def maximumXOR(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        res = 0
        for num in nums:
            res |= num
        return res
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The operation can clear any bit in nums[i] but never set a bit that was not already set. Therefore the maximum XOR is simply the bitwise OR of all numbers, which keeps every bit that appears at least once.
